fleetAPIs.name: Register New Fleet Account
fleetAPIs.description: Vendor registers a new fleet (multi-car owner) with bank and business details.

fleetAPIs.name: Get My Fleets List
fleetAPIs.description: Displays all fleets created by this Vendor.

fleetAPIs.name: Get Fleet Details
fleetAPIs.description: View full details and stats of a specific fleet account.

fleetAPIs.name: Update Fleet Information
fleetAPIs.description: Admin can update fleet owner's business or contact details.

fleetAPIs.name: Toggle Fleet Status (Active/Block)
fleetAPIs.description: Suspend or Activate a specific fleet account.

fleetAPIs.name: Delete Fleet Account
fleetAPIs.description: Permanently remove a fleet account from the system.
